arts.sum: Burn has won the third-most headers of any Premier League player this season, while Strand Larsen ranks just 16th. As with every other outfield Premier League opponent, Burn will look down on Wolves striker Strand Larsen.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United make Lewis Miley decision as they look to avoid June 30 disaster
arts.sum: It was as the Premier League's June 30 financial health check deadline approached last year that both Elliot Anderson and Yankuba Minteh were sold in order to raise the £65million to avoid a points deduction. He said: "The last thing we want to do, or I want to do as the manager of the club, is to sell academy products who have the potential to play for this team for many years.

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha could be the perfect upgrade for Newcastle United
arts.sum: Ahead of the visit of Wolves to St. James' Park, doubts over Isak's fitness have pushed the need for a new centre-forward back into the light. But, I'm not naive or stupid enough to think if a big Champions League team comes in [Cunha won't go] and I think Newcastle will get Champions League football this year and offer him that chance to play in it.

arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle vs Wolves
arts.sum: After their FA Cup exploits, Wolves resume their Premier League campaign on Wednesday evening as they face an away clash at Newcastle United - find out how to follow the live action below. Newcastle vs Wolves kicks off at 7.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 7pm.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs Wolves TV channel, live stream, early kick off time
arts.sum: It's back to the bread and butter of the Premier League for Newcastle United, with two testing St James' Park games in the space of four days. United have racked up eight consecutive wins all all competitions and will be confident of making that nine against a Wolves side that have picked up a little since the arrival of new manager Vítor Pereira, but who are still desperate for points at the bottom end of the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: “Newcastle made some offers” – Dane reckons Magpies bids were more than enough for him
arts.sum: Cast your mind back to January in 2018 and you may remember Newcastle United going hard to sign Nicolai Jørgensen from Feyenoord. They bid several times for the Danish striker, the Dutch side resisted, and that was that. Then followed weeks of comments, disappointment and eventually everyone regretting that it didn’t go through. arts.ttl: Newcastle United scout 6ft 3in star who has intriguing release clause in his contract
arts.sum: Newcastle United have checked up on long-term target Ousmane Diomande once again - according to reports in Portugal. Fabian Schar is in discussions with Newcastle on a new deal as one of the right-sided stars available to Howe while Jamaal Lascelles is edging back to fitness after an ACL operation.
